description: ol-style-prefer-block (issue #169): a `repeat` body uses the bracket `[ … ]` surface form but spans multiple physical lines (spec/tooling.md:244) — a long `… end repeat` block reads more clearly here. One command per line and consistent indentation mean this fixture never triggers ol-style-one-command-per-line or ol-style-block-indentation, isolating the identity check for this lint alone.
